relations: Facebook is one of the platforms encompassed by the broader term social media
Twitter is part of the social media ecosystem, contributing to its impact on communication and information sharing
Instagram is a key player in the social media landscape, affecting how people share and consume visual content
Snapchat is included under the umbrella of social media platforms, known for its unique approach to messaging and content sharing
Social media platforms have facilitated the rise of citizen journalism by allowing users to share news and information instantly, broadening the scope of who can disseminate news
Social media platforms have been criticized for the rise of misinformation and fake news, making it hard to discern fact from fiction
Social media has changed the way people connect, share information, and interact, both positively by empowering voices and negatively by promoting shallow interactions
Twitter, in particular, has been instrumental in the spread of citizen journalism, providing a platform for real-time news sharing and discussions
